### 7. **Critical Regex Patterns (ReDoS Analysis)**

**Shared INLINE_SKIP_R pattern** (Used in Spoiler, KaTeX, Insert):
```
((?:\\[.*?\\][([].*?[)\\]]|<.*?>(?:.*?<.*?>)?|`.*?`|\\\\\\1|\\|\\|.*?\\|\\||[\\s\\S])+?)
```
**Analysis:** Uses lazy quantifiers and alternation. Potential for catastrophic backtracking on malformed input with unmatched brackets/quotes.

**Container Rule Regex:**
```
/^\s*::: *(?<type>.*?) *(?:{(?<params>.*?)} *)?\n(?<content>[\S\s]+?)\s*::: *(?:\n *)+/
```
**Analysis:** `[\S\s]+?` with multiple optional groups - potential ReDoS on input without closing `:::`

**Container Param Parser:**
```javascript
const regex = /(\w+)=(\w+)/g
while ((match = regex.exec(input)) !== null) { ... }
```
**Analysis:** Safe, simple pattern. Potential infinite loop risk if regex doesn't advance.

**Mention Rule Regex:**
```
/^(\[(?<displayName>.*?)])?{((?<prefix>(GH)|(TW)|(TG))@(?<name>\w+\b))}\s?(?!\[.*?])/
```
**Analysis:** Nested lazy quantifier `.*?` with lookahead - moderate ReDoS risk

**Image Extraction Regex:**
```
/^!\[((?:\[[^\]]*]|[^[\]]|](?=[^[]*]))*)]\(\s*<?((?:[^\s\\]|\\.)*?)>?(?:\s+["']([\S\s]*?)["'])?\s*\)/
```
**Analysis:** Complex alternation with character classes - potential catastrophic backtracking on certain malformed markdown

**Slugify Function** (Lines 384-398):
- Uses multiple `.replaceAll()` with character class regexes
- Safe patterns (character classes), no complex backtracking risk

---

   160→          [RuleType.textMarked]: {

   236→                }
   237→              })()

   239→              return (

   242→                    as="span"
   243→                    type="tooltip"
   244→                    wrapperClassName="inline"
   245→                    triggerElement={

   263→                  >

   272→                </Fragment>

   274→            },
   275→          },
   276→

   278→            render(node, output, state) {

   281→                  attrs={node?.rawAttrs}
   282→                  content={node.text}
   283→                  key={state?.key}
   284→                  lang={node.lang}
   285→                />
   286→              )
   287→            },
   288→          },
   289→          [RuleType.codeInline]: {
   290→            render(node, output, state) {
   291→              return (

   299→            },

   302→          [RuleType.orderedList]: listRule as any,

   310→
   311→          ins: InsertRule,

   321→    }, [
   322→      value,
   323→      props.children,

   327→      renderers,

   333→
   334→    return (

   339→            {...wrapperProps}
   340→            ref={wrapperRef as any}
   341→            className={clsx(
   342→              'markdown',
   343→              codeBlockFully ? 'markdown--code-fully' : undefined,
   344→              variant !== 'post' && `markdown--${variant}`,

   347→          >

   354→Markdown.displayName = 'Markdown'
   355→
   356→export const MainMarkdown: FC<
   357→  MdProps & MarkdownToJSX.Options & PropsWithChildren
   358→> = (props) => {
   359→  const { wrapperProps = noopObj } = props
   360→  const setMainMarkdownRef = useCallback((element: HTMLElement | null) => {
   361→    setMainMarkdownElement(element)
   362→  }, [])
   363→
   364→  return (
   365→    <Markdown
   366→      as="main"
   367→      {...props}
   368→      wrapperRef={setMainMarkdownRef}
   369→      wrapperProps={useMemo(
   370→        () => ({
   371→          ...wrapperProps,
   372→          id: MAIN_CONTENT_ID,
   373→        }),
   374→        [wrapperProps],
   375→      )}
   376→    />
   377→  )
   378→}
   379→
   380→// not complete, but probably good enough
   381→function slugify(str: string) {
   382→  return (
   383→    str
   384→      .replaceAll(/[àáâãäåæ]/gi, 'a')
   385→      .replaceAll(/ç/gi, 'c')
   386→      .replaceAll(/ð/gi, 'd')
   387→      .replaceAll(/[èéêë]/gi, 'e')
   388→      .replaceAll(/[ìíîï]/gi, 'i')
   389→      .replaceAll(/ñ/gi, 'n')
   390→      .replaceAll(/[òóôõøœ]/gi, 'o')
   391→      .replaceAll(/[ùúûü]/gi, 'u')
   392→      .replaceAll(/[ýÿ]/gi, 'y')
   393→      // remove non-chinese, non-latin, non-number, non-space
   394→      .replaceAll(
   395→        /[^\d a-z\u3040-\u30FF\u4E00-\u9FFF\uAC00-\uD7AF-]/gi,
   396→        '',
   397→      )
   398→      .replaceAll(' ', '-')
   399→      .toLowerCase()
   400→  )
   401→}
   402→
   403→const listRule: Partial<
   404→  MarkdownToJSX.Rule<
   405→    MarkdownToJSX.OrderedListNode | MarkdownToJSX.UnorderedListNode
   406→  >
   407→> = {
   408→  render(node, output, state) {
   409→    const Tag = node.ordered ? 'ol' : 'ul'
   410→
   411→    return (
   412→      <Tag
   413→        key={state?.key}
   414→        start={node.type === RuleType.orderedList ? node.start : undefined}
   415→      >
   416→        {node.items.map((item: any, i: number) => {
   417→          let className = ''
   418→          if (item[0]?.type === 'gfmTask') {
   419→            className = 'list-none flex items-center'
   420→          }
   421→
   422→          return (
   423→            <li className={className} key={i}>
   424→              {output(item, state!)}
   425→            </li>
   426→          )
   427→        })}
   428→      </Tag>
   429→    )
   430→  },
   431→}
   432→

     5→import xss from 'xss'
     6→
     7→import { CDN_HOST } from '~/app.static.config'
     8→import { ContainerRule as __ContainerRule } from '~/components/ui/markdown/parsers/container'
     9→import { InsertRule } from '~/components/ui/markdown/parsers/ins'
    10→import { MentionRule } from '~/components/ui/markdown/parsers/mention'
    11→import { SpoilerRule } from '~/components/ui/markdown/parsers/spoiler'
    12→import { get } from '~/lib/lodash'
    13→import { apiClient } from '~/lib/request'
    14→
    15→export const dynamic = 'force-dynamic'
    16→export const revalidate = 60
    17→
    18→interface RSSProps {
    19→  author: string
    20→  data: {
    21→    created: Date | null
    22→    modified: Date | null
    23→    link: string
    24→    title: string
    25→    text: string
    26→    id: string
    27→    images: Image[]
    28→  }[]
    29→  description: string
    30→  title: string
    31→  url: string
    32→}
    33→
    34→export async function GET() {
    35→  const ReactDOM = (await import('react-dom/server')).default
    36→
    37→  const [{ author, data, url }, agg] = await Promise.all([
    38→    apiClient.aggregate.proxy.feed.get<RSSProps>(),
    39→    apiClient.aggregate.getAggregateData<AppThemeConfig>('shiro'),
    40→  ])
    41→
    42→  const { title, description } = agg.seo
    43→
    44→  const now = new Date()
    45→  const custom_elements = get(
    46→    agg.$raw.theme as AppConfig,
    47→    'config.module.rss.custom_elements',
    48→  )
    49→  const noRSS = get(agg.$raw.theme as AppConfig, 'config.module.rss.noRSS')
    50→
    51→  const followChallengeIndex = custom_elements
    52→    ? custom_elements.findIndex((item: any) => item.follow_challenge)
    53→    : -1
    54→  if (-~followChallengeIndex) {
    55→    const map = {} as Record<string, string>
    56→
    57→    const { follow_challenge } = custom_elements[followChallengeIndex]
    58→    for (const item of follow_challenge) {
    59→      Object.assign(map, item)
    60→    }
    61→
    62→    custom_elements[followChallengeIndex].follow_challenge = [
    63→      {
    64→        feedId: map.feed_id,
    65→      },
    66→      {
    67→        userId: map.user_id,
    68→      },
    69→    ]
    70→  }
    71→
    72→  const imageUrl = agg.theme?.config?.site?.favicon.startsWith('/')
    73→    ? `${url}${agg.theme?.config?.site?.favicon}`
    74→    : agg.theme?.config?.site?.favicon
    75→
    76→  const feed = new RSS({
    77→    title,
    78→    description,
    79→    site_url: url,
    80→    feed_url: `${url}/feed`,
    81→    language: 'zh-CN',
    82→    image_url: imageUrl,
    83→    generator: 'Shiro (https://github.com/Innei/Shiro)',
    84→    pubDate: now.toUTCString(),
    85→
    86→    custom_elements,
    87→  })
    88→
    89→  data.forEach((item) => {
    90→    const render = () => {
    91→      if (noRSS) {
    92→        return ReactDOM.renderToString(
    93→          <p>
    94→            前往原站查看：
    95→            <a href={`${xss(item.link)}`}>{xss(item.link)}</a>
    96→          </p>,
    97→        )
    98→      }
    99→      try {
   100→        return ReactDOM.renderToString(
   101→          <div>
   102→            <blockquote>
   103→              该渲染由 Shiro API 生成，可能存在排版问题，最佳体验请前往：
   104→              <a href={`${xss(item.link)}`}>{xss(item.link)}</a>
   105→            </blockquote>
   106→            {compiler(item.text, {
   107→              overrides: {
   108→                LinkCard: NotSupportRender,
   109→                Gallery: NotSupportRender,
   110→                Tabs: NotSupportRender,
   111→                Tab: NotSupportRender,
   112→
   113→                img: ({ src, alt, height, width }) => {
   114→                  if (src && new URL(src).hostname === CDN_HOST) {
   115→                    return <span>此图片不支持在 RSS Render 中查看。</span>
   116→                  }
   117→
   118→                  const meta = item.images?.find((image) => image.src === src)
   119→
   120→                  return (
   121→                    <img
   122→                      alt={alt}
   123→                      height={height || meta?.height}
   124→                      src={src}
   125→                      width={width || meta?.width}
   126→                    />
   127→                  )
   128→                },
   129→              },
   130→              overrideRules: {
   131→                [RuleType.textMarked]: {
   132→                  render(node, output, state) {
   133→                    return (
   134→                      <mark className="rounded-md" key={state?.key}>
   135→                        <span className="px-1">
   136→                          {output(node.children, state!)}
   137→                        </span>
   138→                      </mark>
   139→                    )
   140→                  },
   141→                },
   142→                [RuleType.codeBlock]: {
   143→                  render(node, output, state) {
   144→                    if (
   145→                      node.lang === 'mermaid' ||
   146→                      node.lang === 'excalidraw' ||
   147→                      node.lang === 'component'
   148→                    ) {
   149→                      return <NotSupportRender />
   150→                    }
   151→                    return (
   152→                      <pre
   153→                        key={state?.key}
   154→                        className={
   155→                          node.lang
   156→                            ? `language-${node.lang} lang-${node.lang}`
   157→                            : ''
   158→                        }
   159→                      >
   160→                        <code
   161→                          className={
   162→                            node.lang
   163→                              ? `language-${node.lang} lang-${node.lang}`
   164→                              : ''
   165→                          }
   166→                        >
   167→                          {node.text}
   168→                        </code>
   169→                      </pre>
   170→                    )
   171→                  },
   172→                },
   173→              },
   174→              extendsRules: {
   175→                spoilder: SpoilerRule,
   176→                mention: MentionRule,
   177→
   178→                ins: InsertRule,
   179→
   180→                // kateX: KateXRule,
   181→                // kateXBlock: KateXBlockRule,
   182→                container: ContainerRule,
   183→              },
   184→            })}
   185→            <p
   186→              style={{
   187→                textAlign: 'right',
   188→              }}
   189→            >
   190→              <a href={`${`${xss(item.link)}#comments`}`}>看完了？说点什么呢</a>
   191→            </p>
   192→          </div>,
   193→        )
   194→      } catch {
   195→        return ReactDOM.renderToString(
   196→          <p>
   197→            当前内容无法在 RSS 阅读器中正确渲染，请前往：
   198→            <a href={`${xss(item.link)}`}>{xss(item.link)}</a>
   199→          </p>,
   200→        )
   201→      }
   202→    }
   203→    feed.item({
   204→      author,
   205→      title: item.title,
   206→      url: item.link,
   207→      date: item.created!,
   208→      description: render(),
   209→    })
   210→  })
   211→
   212→  return new Response(`${feed.xml()}`, {
   213→    headers: {
   214→      'Content-Type': 'application/xml',
   215→      'Cache-Control': `max-age=60, s-maxage=${revalidate}`,
   216→      'CDN-Cache-Control': `max-age=${revalidate}`,
   217→      'Cloudflare-CDN-Cache-Control': `max-age=${revalidate}`,
   218→      'Vercel-CDN-Cache-Control': `max-age=${revalidate}`,
   219→    },
   220→  })
   221→}
   222→
   223→const NotSupportRender = () => {
   224→  // throw new Error('Not support render in RSS')
   225→  return (
   226→    <p
   227→      style={{
   228→        padding: '6px 12px',
   229→        borderLeft: '2px solid #33A6B8',
   230→        background: '#33A6B850',
   231→        fontStyle: 'italic',
   232→        fontWeight: 500,
   233→      }}
   234→    >
   235→      Not support render this content in RSS render
   236→    </p>
   237→  )
   238→}
   239→
   240→const ContainerRule: MarkdownToJSX.Rule = {
   241→  ...__ContainerRule,
   242→
   243→  render(node, _, state) {
   244→    return <NotSupportRender key={state?.key} />
   245→  },
   246→}
   247→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
     1→import type { MarkdownToJSX } from 'markdown-to-jsx'
     2→
     3→function parseInline(
     4→  parse: MarkdownToJSX.NestedParser,
     5→  children: string,
     6→  state: MarkdownToJSX.State,
     7→): MarkdownToJSX.ParserResult[] {
     8→  const isCurrentlyInline = state.inline || false
     9→  const isCurrentlySimple = state.simple || false
    10→  state.inline = true
    11→  state.simple = true
    12→  const result = parse(children, state)
    13→  state.inline = isCurrentlyInline
    14→  state.simple = isCurrentlySimple
    15→  return result
    16→}
    17→
    18→export const parseCaptureInline: MarkdownToJSX.Parser<{
    19→  children: MarkdownToJSX.ParserResult[]
    20→}> = (capture, parse, state: MarkdownToJSX.State = {}) => {
    21→  return {
    22→    children: parseInline(parse, capture[2], state),
    23→  }
    24→}
    25→
    26→export function simpleInlineRegex(regex: RegExp) {
    27→  return allowInline(function match(
    28→    source: string,
    29→    state: MarkdownToJSX.State,
    30→  ) {
    31→    if (state.inline || state.simple) {
    32→      return regex.exec(source)
    33→    } else {
    34→      return null
    35→    }
    36→  })
    37→}
    38→
    39→export function blockRegex(regex: RegExp) {
    40→  return function match(source: string, state: MarkdownToJSX.State) {
    41→    if (state.inline || state.simple) {
    42→      return null
    43→    } else {
    44→      return regex.exec(source)
    45→    }
    46→  }
    47→}
    48→
    49→export function allowInline<T extends Function & { inline?: 0 | 1 }>(fn: T) {
    50→  fn.inline = 1
    51→
    52→  return fn
    53→}
    54→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
     1→import type { MarkdownToJSX } from 'markdown-to-jsx'
     2→import { Priority } from 'markdown-to-jsx'
     3→import * as React from 'react'
     4→
     5→import { SocialSourceLink } from '../../rich-link/SocialSourceLink'
     6→import { allowInline } from '../utils/parser'
     7→
     8→// [Innei]{GH@Innei} {TW@Innei} {TG@Innei}
     9→export const MentionRule: MarkdownToJSX.Rule<{
    10→  content: Record<string, string>
    11→}> = {
    12→  match: allowInline((source) => {
    13→    return /^(\[(?<displayName>.*?)])?{((?<prefix>(GH)|(TW)|(TG))@(?<name>\w+\b))}\s?(?!\[.*?])/.exec(
    14→      source,
    15→    )
    16→  }),
    17→  order: Priority.LOW,
    18→  parse(capture) {
    19→    const { groups } = capture
    20→
    21→    if (!groups) {
    22→      return {
    23→        content: {},
    24→      }
    25→    }
    26→    return {
    27→      content: { ...groups },
    28→    }
    29→  },
    30→  render(result, _, state) {
    31→    const { content } = result
    32→    if (!content) {
    33→      return null as any
    34→    }
    35→
    36→    const { prefix, name, displayName } = content
    37→    if (!name) {
    38→      return null as any
    39→    }
    40→
    41→    return (
    42→      <SocialSourceLink
    43→        key={state?.key}
    44→        name={displayName || name}
    45→        source={prefix}
    46→      />
    47→    )
    48→  },
    49→}
    50→
```
</details></tool-use>

     1→import type { MarkdownToJSX } from 'markdown-to-jsx'
     2→import { Priority } from 'markdown-to-jsx'
     3→
     4→import { Spoiler } from '../renderers/spoiler'
     5→import { parseCaptureInline, simpleInlineRegex } from '../utils/parser'
     6→
     7→const INLINE_SKIP_R =
     8→  '((?:\\[.*?\\][([].*?[)\\]]|<.*?>(?:.*?<.*?>)?|`.*?`|\\\\\\1|\\|\\|.*?\\|\\||[\\s\\S])+?)'
     9→
    10→// ||Spoiler||
    11→export const SpoilerRule: MarkdownToJSX.Rule<{
    12→  children: MarkdownToJSX.ParserResult[]
    13→}> = {
    14→  match: simpleInlineRegex(new RegExp(`^(\\|\\|)${INLINE_SKIP_R}\\1`)),
    15→  order: Priority.LOW,
    16→  parse: parseCaptureInline,
    17→  render(node, output, state?) {
    18→    return <Spoiler key={state?.key}>{output(node.children, state!)}</Spoiler>
    19→  },
    20→}

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./apps/web/src/components/ui/markdown/parsers/katex.tsx`

```text
     1→'use client'
     2→
     3→import 'katex/dist/katex.min.css'
     4→
     5→import type { MarkdownToJSX } from 'markdown-to-jsx'
     6→import { Priority } from 'markdown-to-jsx'
     7→
     8→import { KateX } from '../../katex'
     9→import { blockRegex, simpleInlineRegex } from '../utils/parser'
    10→
    11→const INLINE_SKIP_R =
    12→  '((?:\\[.*?\\][([].*?[)\\]]|<.*?>(?:.*?<.*?>)?|`.*?`|\\\\\\1|[\\s\\S])+?)'
    13→
    14→//  $ c = \pm\sqrt{a^2 + b^2} $
    15→export const KateXRule: MarkdownToJSX.Rule<{
    16→  katex: string
    17→}> = {
    18→  match: simpleInlineRegex(new RegExp(`^(\\$)(${INLINE_SKIP_R})\\1`)),
    19→  order: Priority.LOW,
    20→  parse(capture) {
    21→    return {
    22→      type: 'kateX',
    23→      katex: capture[2],
    24→    }
    25→  },
    26→  render(node, output, state) {
    27→    return <KateX key={state?.key}>{node.katex}</KateX>
    28→  },
    29→}
    30→export const KateXBlockRule: MarkdownToJSX.Rule<{
    31→  groups: Record<string, string> | undefined
    32→}> = {
    33→  match: blockRegex(
    34→    new RegExp(`^\\s*\\$\\$ *(?<content>[\\s\\S]+?)\\s*\\$\\$ *(?:\n *)+\n?`),
    35→  ),
    36→
    37→  order: Priority.MED,
    38→  parse(capture) {
    39→    return {
    40→      type: 'kateXBlock',
    41→      groups: capture.groups,
    42→    }
    43→  },
    44→  render(node, _, state?) {
    45→    if (!node.groups) {
    46→      return null
    47→    }
    48→    return (
    49→      <div className="scrollbar-none overflow-auto" key={state?.key}>
    50→        <KateX mode="display">{node.groups?.content}</KateX>
    51→      </div>
    52→    )
    53→  },
    54→}
    55→
```

<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./apps/web/src/components/ui/markdown/parsers/container.tsx`

```text
     1→'use client'
     2→
     3→import type { MarkdownToJSX } from 'markdown-to-jsx'
     4→import { Priority } from 'markdown-to-jsx'
     5→import Masonry, { ResponsiveMasonry } from 'react-responsive-masonry'
     6→
     7→import { clsxm } from '~/lib/helper'
     8→import { WrappedElementProvider } from '~/providers/shared/WrappedElementProvider'
     9→
    10→import { Banner } from '../../banner/Banner'
    11→import { Gallery } from '../../gallery/Gallery'
    12→import { Markdown } from '../Markdown'
    13→import { GridMarkdownImage, GridMarkdownImages } from '../renderers/image'
    14→import { pickImagesFromMarkdown } from '../utils/image'
    15→
    16→const shouldCatchContainerName = [
    17→  'gallery',
    18→  'banner',
    19→  'carousel',
    20→
    21→  'warn',
    22→  'error',
    23→  'danger',
    24→  'info',
    25→  'success',
    26→  'warning',
    27→  'note',
    28→
    29→  'grid',
    30→  'masonry',
    31→].join('|')
    32→
    33→export const ContainerRule: MarkdownToJSX.Rule<{
    34→  node: {
    35→    type: string
    36→    params: string
    37→    content: string
    38→  }
    39→}> = {
    40→  match: (source: string) => {
    41→    const result =
    42→      /^\s*::: *(?<type>.*?) *(?:{(?<params>.*?)} *)?\n(?<content>[\S\s]+?)\s*::: *(?:\n *)+/.exec(
    43→        source,
    44→      )
    45→
    46→    if (!result) return null
    47→
    48→    const { type } = result.groups!
    49→    if (!type || !type.match(shouldCatchContainerName)) return null
    50→    return result
    51→  },
    52→  order: Priority.MED,
    53→  parse(capture) {
    54→    const { groups } = capture
    55→    return {
    56→      node: { ...groups } as any,
    57→    }
    58→  },
    59→
    60→  render(node, _, state) {
    61→    const { type, params, content } = node.node
    62→
    63→    switch (type) {
    64→      case 'carousel':
    65→      case 'gallery': {
    66→        return (
    67→          <Gallery images={pickImagesFromMarkdown(content)} key={state?.key} />
    68→        )
    69→      }
    70→      case 'warn':
    71→      case 'error':
    72→      case 'danger':
    73→      case 'info':
    74→      case 'note':
    75→      case 'success':
    76→      case 'warning': {
    77→        const transformMap = {
    78→          warning: 'warn',
    79→          danger: 'error',
    80→          note: 'info',
    81→        }
    82→        return (
    83→          <Banner
    84→            className="my-4"
    85→            key={state?.key}
    86→            type={(transformMap as any)[type] || type}
    87→          >
    88→            <WrappedElementProvider className="w-full">
    89→              <Markdown
    90→                allowsScript
    91→                className="w-full [&>p:first-child]:mt-0"
    92→                value={content}
    93→              />
    94→            </WrappedElementProvider>
    95→          </Banner>
    96→        )
    97→      }
    98→      case 'banner': {
    99→        if (!params) {
   100→          break
   101→        }
   102→
   103→        return (
   104→          <Banner
   105→            className="my-4"
   106→            key={state?.key}
   107→            type={params as 'warn' | 'error' | 'info' | 'success' | 'warning'}
   108→          >
   109→            <WrappedElementProvider className="w-full">
   110→              <Markdown
   111→                allowsScript
   112→                className="w-full [&>p:first-child]:mt-0"
   113→                value={content}
   114→              />
   115→            </WrappedElementProvider>
   116→          </Banner>
   117→        )
   118→      }
   119→
   120→      case 'grid': {
   121→        // cols=2,gap=4,rows=2,type=images
   122→
   123→        const { cols, gap = 8, rows, type = 'normal' } = parseParams(params)
   124→
   125→        const Grid: Component = ({ children, className }) => (
   126→          <div
   127→            className={clsxm('relative grid w-full', className)}
   128→            style={{
   129→              gridTemplateColumns: cols
   130→                ? `repeat(${cols}, minmax(0, 1fr))`
   131→                : undefined,
   132→              gap: `${gap}px`,
   133→              gridTemplateRows: rows
   134→                ? `repeat(${rows}, minmax(0, 1fr))`
   135→                : undefined,
   136→            }}
   137→          >
   138→            {children}
   139→          </div>
   140→        )
   141→        switch (type) {
   142→          case 'normal': {
   143→            return (
   144→              <Grid key={state?.key}>
   145→                <Markdown
   146→                  allowsScript
   147→                  removeWrapper
   148→                  className="w-full [&>p:first-child]:mt-0"
   149→                  value={content}
   150→                  overrides={{
   151→                    img: GridMarkdownImage,
   152→                  }}
   153→                />
   154→              </Grid>
   155→            )
   156→          }
   157→          case 'images': {
   158→            const imagesSrc = pickImagesFromMarkdown(content).map((r) => r.url)
   159→
   160→            return (
   161→              <GridMarkdownImages
   162→                Wrapper={Grid}
   163→                height={rows && cols ? +rows / +cols : 1}
   164→                imagesSrc={imagesSrc}
   165→                key={state?.key}
   166→              />
   167→            )
   168→          }
   169→          default: {
   170→            return null
   171→          }
   172→        }
   173→      }
   174→      case 'masonry': {
   175→        const { gap = 8 } = parseParams(params)
   176→        const imagesSrc = pickImagesFromMarkdown(content).map((r) => r.url)
   177→
   178→        return (
   179→          <ResponsiveMasonry
   180→            columnsCountBreakPoints={{
   181→              350: 1,
   182→              750: 2,
   183→            }}
   184→          >
   185→            <Masonry className="[&_figure]:my-0" gutter={`${gap}px`}>
   186→              {imagesSrc.map((src) => (
   187→                <GridMarkdownImage key={src} src={src} />
   188→              ))}
   189→            </Masonry>
   190→          </ResponsiveMasonry>
   191→        )
   192→      }
   193→    }
   194→
   195→    return (
   196→      <div key={state?.key}>
   197→        <p>{content}</p>
   198→      </div>
   199→    )
   200→  },
   201→}
   202→
   203→/**
   204→ * gallery container
   205→ *
   206→ * ::: gallery
   207→ * ![name](url)
   208→ * ![name](url)
   209→ * ![name](url)
   210→ * :::
   211→ */
   212→
   213→type ParsedResult = Record<string, string>
   214→
   215→function parseParams(input: string): ParsedResult {
   216→  const regex = /(\w+)=(\w+)/g
   217→  let match: RegExpExecArray | null
   218→  const result: ParsedResult = {}
   219→
   220→  while ((match = regex.exec(input)) !== null) {
   221→    const key = match[1]
   222→    const value = match[2]
   223→    result[key] = value
   224→  }
   225→
   226→  return result
   227→}
   228→
```
</details></tool-use>

     1→export interface MImageType {
     2→  footnote?: string
     3→  name?: string
     4→  url: string
     5→}
     6→export const pickImagesFromMarkdown = (md: string) => {
     7→  const regexp =
     8→    /^!\[((?:\[[^\]]*]|[^[\]]|](?=[^[]*]))*)]\(\s*<?((?:[^\s\\]|\\.)*?)>?(?:\s+["']([\S\s]*?)["'])?\s*\)/
     9→
    10→  const lines = md.split('\n')
    11→
    12→  const res: MImageType[] = []
    13→
    14→  for (const line of lines) {
    15→    if (!line.startsWith('!') && isRawImageUrl(line)) {
    16→      res.push({ url: line, name: line })
    17→      continue
    18→    }
    19→
    20→    const match = regexp.exec(line)
    21→    if (!match) {
    22→      continue
    23→    }
    24→
    25→    const [, name, url, footnote] = match
    26→    res.push({ name, url, footnote })
    27→  }
    28→
    29→  return res
    30→}
    31→
    32→const isRawImageUrl = (url: string) => {
    33→  try {
    34→    const parsedUrl = new URL(url)
    35→    return Boolean(parsedUrl)
    36→  } catch {
    37→    return false
    38→  }
    39→}
    40→
```

     1→import type { AggregateRoot } from '@mx-space/api-client'
     2→import { simpleCamelcaseKeys } from '@mx-space/api-client'
     3→import RSS from 'rss'
     4→
     5→import { apiClient } from '~/lib/request'
     6→
     7→export const dynamic = 'force-dynamic'
     8→export const revalidate = 86400 // 1 day
     9→
    10→export async function GET() {
    11→  const [agg, says] = await Promise.all([
    12→    fetch(apiClient.aggregate.proxy.toString(true), {
    13→      next: {
    14→        revalidate: 86400,
    15→      },
    16→    }).then(
    17→      async (res) =>
    18→        simpleCamelcaseKeys(await res.json()) as Promise<AggregateRoot>,
    19→    ),
    20→    apiClient.say.getAllPaginated(1, 20),
    21→  ])
    22→
    23→  const { title, description } = agg.seo
    24→
    25→  const now = new Date()
    26→  const feed = new RSS({
    27→    title: `一言 - ${title}`,
    28→    description,
    29→    site_url: agg.url.webUrl,
    30→    feed_url: `${agg.url.webUrl}/says/feed`,
    31→    language: 'zh-CN',
    32→    generator: 'Shiro (https://github.com/Innei/Shiro)',
    33→    pubDate: now.toUTCString(),
    34→  })
    35→
    36→  for (const say of says.data) {
    37→    feed.item({
    38→      title: `来源于 ${say.source || say.author} 的一言`,
    39→      description: `${say.text}\n\n —— ${say.source || say.author}`,
    40→      url: `${agg.url.webUrl}/says`,
    41→      author: `${say.source || say.author}`,
    42→      guid: say.id,
    43→      date: say.created,
    44→    })
    45→  }
    46→
    47→  return new Response(feed.xml(), {
    48→    headers: {
    49→      'Content-Type': 'application/xml',
    50→      'Cache-Control': 'max-age=60, s-maxage=86400',
    51→      'CDN-Cache-Control': 'max-age=86400',
    52→      'Cloudflare-CDN-Cache-Control': 'max-age=86400',
    53→      'Vercel-CDN-Cache-Control': 'max-age=86400',
    54→    },
    55→  })
    56→}
    57→
```

     1→import { useAtom } from 'jotai'
     2→import { marked } from 'marked'
     3→import type { FC } from 'react'
     4→import { memo, useEffect, useMemo, useState } from 'react'
     5→
     6→import { useWebglFlagAtom } from '~/atoms'
     7→import { MotionButtonBase, StyledButton } from '~/components/ui/button'
     8→import { CheckBoxLabel } from '~/components/ui/checkbox/CheckBox'
     9→import { Collapse } from '~/components/ui/collapse'
    10→import { Divider } from '~/components/ui/divider'
    11→import { AdvancedInput, AdvancedInputProvider } from '~/components/ui/input'
    12→import { Label, LabelProvider } from '~/components/ui/label'
    13→import { useEventCallback } from '~/hooks/common/use-event-callback'
    14→import {
    15→  encodeImageToBlurhash,
    16→  encodeImageToBlurhashWebgl,
    17→  getDominantColor,
    18→} from '~/lib/image'
    19→import { uniqBy } from '~/lib/lodash'
    20→import { toast } from '~/lib/toast'
    21→import type { WriteBaseType } from '~/models/writing'
    22→
    23→const pickImagesFromMarkdown = (text: string) => {
    24→  const ast = marked.lexer(text)
    25→  const images = new Set<string>()
    26→  function pickImage(node: any) {
    27→    if (node.type === 'image') {
    28→      images.add(node.href)
    29→      return
    30→    }
    31→    if (node.tokens && Array.isArray(node.tokens)) {
    32→      return node.tokens.forEach(pickImage)
    33→    }
    34→  }
    35→  ast.forEach(pickImage)
    36→
    37→  return [...images.values()]
    38→}
    39→
    40→type ArticleImage = WriteBaseType['images'][number]
    41→
    42→export interface ImageDetailSectionProps {
    43→  extraImages?: string[]
    44→  images: ArticleImage[]
    45→  onChange: (images: ArticleImage[]) => void
    46→  text: string
    47→
    48→  withDivider?: 'top' | 'bottom' | 'both'
    49→}
    50→
    51→export const ImageDetailSection: FC<ImageDetailSectionProps> = (props) => {
    52→  const { images, text, onChange, extraImages, withDivider } = props
    53→
    54→  const originImageMap = useMemo(() => {
    55→    const map = new Map<string, ArticleImage>()
    56→    images.forEach((image) => {
    57→      map.set(image.src, image)
    58→    })
    59→    return map
    60→  }, [images])
    61→
    62→  const fromText = useMemo(
    63→    () => pickImagesFromMarkdown(text).filter((src) => src.startsWith('http')),
    64→    [text],
    65→  )
    66→
    67→  const hasTopDivider = withDivider === 'top' || withDivider === 'both'
    68→  const hasBottomDivider = withDivider === 'bottom' || withDivider === 'both'
    69→
    70→  const nextImages = useMemo<ArticleImage[]>(() => {
    71→    const basedImages: ArticleImage[] = text
    72→      ? uniqBy(
    73→          fromText
    74→            .map((src) => {
    75→              const existImageInfo = originImageMap.get(src)
    76→
    77→              return {
    78→                src,
    79→                height: existImageInfo?.height,
    80→                width: existImageInfo?.width,
    81→                type: existImageInfo?.type,
    82→                accent: existImageInfo?.accent,
    83→                blurhash: existImageInfo?.blurhash,
    84→              } as any
    85→            })
    86→            .concat(images)
    87→            .filter(Boolean),
    88→          (s) => s.src,
    89→        )
    90→      : images
    91→    const srcSet = new Set<string>()
    92→
    93→    for (const image of basedImages) {
    94→      image.src && srcSet.add(image.src)
    95→    }
    96→    const nextImages = basedImages.concat()
    97→    if (extraImages) {
    98→      // 需要过滤存在的图片
    99→      extraImages.forEach((src) => {
   100→        if (!srcSet.has(src)) {
   101→          nextImages.push({
   102→            src,
   103→            height: 0,
   104→            width: 0,
   105→            type: '',
   106→            accent: '',
   107→          })
   108→        }
   109→      })
   110→    }
   111→
   112→    return nextImages
   113→  }, [extraImages, images, originImageMap, JSON.stringify(fromText)])
   114→
   115→  // GPU 加速 flag
   116→  const [useWebgl, setUseWebgl] = useAtom(useWebglFlagAtom)
   117→
   118→  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false)
   119→  const handleCorrectImageDimensions = useEventCallback(
   120→    async (images: ArticleImage[]) => {
   121→      if (loading) return
   122→      setLoading(true)
   123→
   124→      const fetchImageTasks = await Promise.allSettled(
   125→        images.map(
   126→          (item) =>
   127→            new Promise<ArticleImage>((resolve, reject) => {
   128→              const $image = new Image()
   129→              $image.src = item.src
   130→              $image.crossOrigin = 'Anonymous'
   131→              $image.onload = () => {
   132→                try {
   133→                  const blurhash = useWebgl
   134→                    ? encodeImageToBlurhashWebgl($image)
   135→                    : encodeImageToBlurhash($image)
   136→                  resolve({
   137→                    width: $image.naturalWidth,
   138→                    height: $image.naturalHeight,
   139→                    src: item.src,
   140→                    type: $image.src.split('.').pop() || '',
   141→                    accent: getDominantColor($image),
   142→                    blurhash,
   143→                  })
   144→                } catch (err) {
   145→                  // 如果 WebGL 失败，回退到普通方式
   146→                  if (useWebgl && err instanceof Error) {
   147→                    try {
   148→                      const blurhash = encodeImageToBlurhash($image)
   149→                      resolve({
   150→                        width: $image.naturalWidth,
   151→                        height: $image.naturalHeight,
   152→                        src: item.src,
   153→                        type: $image.src.split('.').pop() || '',
   154→                        accent: getDominantColor($image),
   155→                        blurhash,
   156→                      })
   157→                    } catch (fallbackErr) {
   158→                      reject({
   159→                        err: fallbackErr,
   160→                        src: item.src,
   161→                      })
   162→                    }
   163→                  } else {
   164→                    reject({
   165→                      err,
   166→                      src: item.src,
   167→                    })
   168→                  }
   169→                }
   170→              }
   171→              $image.onerror = (err) => {
   172→                reject({
   173→                  err,
   174→                  src: item.src,
   175→                })
   176→              }
   177→            }),
   178→        ),
   179→      )
   180→
   181→      setLoading(false)
   182→
   183→      const nextImageDimensions = [] as ArticleImage[]
   184→      fetchImageTasks.forEach((task) => {
   185→        if (task.status === 'fulfilled') nextImageDimensions.push(task.value)
   186→        else {
   187→          toast.error(
   188→            `获取图片信息失败：${task.reason.src}: ${task.reason.err}`,
   189→          )
   190→        }
   191→      })
   192→
   193→      onChange(nextImageDimensions)
   194→
   195→      setLoading(false)
   196→    },
   197→  )
   198→
   199→  const handleOnChange = useEventCallback(
   200→    <T extends keyof ArticleImage>(
   201→      src: string,
   202→      key: T,
   203→      value: ArticleImage[T],
   204→    ) => {
   205→      if (key == 'src' && value === '') {
   206→        onChange(nextImages.filter((item) => item.src !== src))
   207→        return
   208→      }
   209→      onChange(
   210→        nextImages.map((item) => {
   211→          if (item.src === src) {
   212→            return {
   213→              ...item,
   214→              [key]: value,
   215→            }
   216→          }
   217→          return item
   218→        }),
   219→      )
   220→    },
   221→  )
   222→
   223→  if (nextImages.length === 0) return null
   224→
   225→  return (
   226→    <>
   227→      {hasTopDivider && <Divider />}
   228→      <div className="relative flex w-full flex-col">
   229→        <div className="flex items-center justify-between space-x-2">
   230→          <div className="inline-block shrink grow">图片信息</div>
   231→          <StyledButton
   232→            className="flex items-center gap-1 self-end"
   233→            disabled={loading}
   234→            variant="secondary"
   235→            onClick={() => handleCorrectImageDimensions(nextImages)}
   236→          >
   237→            {loading && <i className="loading loading-spinner loading-sm" />}
   238→            刷新图片信息
   239→          </StyledButton>
   240→        </div>
   241→        <div className="mt-2 flex items-center gap-2 pl-1 text-sm">
   242→          <CheckBoxLabel
   243→            checked={useWebgl}
   244→            label="使用 GPU 加速"
   245→            onCheckChange={setUseWebgl}
   246→          />
   247→          <span className="text-neutral-8/60">
   248→            （实验性功能，使用 WebGL 计算 BlurHash）
   249→          </span>
   250→        </div>
   251→        <div className="my-2 flex flex-col gap-2">
   252→          {nextImages.map((image) => (
   253→            <Collapse className="mt-4" key={image.src} title={image.src}>
   254→              <Item {...image} handleOnChange={handleOnChange} />
   255→            </Collapse>
   256→          ))}
   257→        </div>
   258→      </div>
   259→      {hasBottomDivider && <Divider />}
   260→    </>
   261→  )
   262→}
   263→
   264→const Item: FC<
   265→  ArticleImage & {
   266→    handleOnChange: <T extends keyof ArticleImage>(
   267→      src: string,
   268→      key: T,
   269→      value: ArticleImage[T],
   270→    ) => void
   271→  }
   272→> = memo(({ handleOnChange, ...image }) => (
   273→  <div className="my-6 flex flex-col space-y-3">
   274→    <LabelProvider className="mr-4 w-20 font-normal">
   275→      <AdvancedInputProvider labelPlacement="left">
   276→        <AdvancedInput
   277→          label="高度"
   278→          value={image.height?.toString() || ''}
   279→          onChange={(e) => {
   280→            const validValue = Number.parseInt(e.target.value)
   281→            if (Number.isNaN(validValue)) return
   282→            handleOnChange(image.src, 'height', validValue)
   283→          }}
   284→        />
   285→        <AdvancedInput
   286→          label="宽度"
   287→          value={image.width?.toString() || ''}
   288→          onChange={(e) => {
   289→            const validValue = Number.parseInt(e.target.value)
   290→            if (Number.isNaN(validValue)) return
   291→            handleOnChange(image.src, 'width', validValue)
   292→          }}
   293→        />
   294→        <AdvancedInput
   295→          label="类型"
   296→          value={image.type?.toString() || ''}
   297→          onChange={(e) => {
   298→            handleOnChange(image.src, 'type', e.target.value)
   299→          }}
   300→        />
   301→      </AdvancedInputProvider>
   302→
   303→      <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
   304→        <Label htmlFor="color-picker">色调</Label>
   305→        <ColorPicker
   306→          accent={image.accent || '#fff'}
   307→          onChange={(hex) => {
   308→            handleOnChange(image.src, 'accent', hex)
   309→          }}
   310→        />
   311→      </div>
   312→
   313→      <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
   314→        <Label>操作</Label>
   315→
   316→        <div className="flex">
   317→          <StyledButton
   318→            className="rounded-r-none border-r-0"
   319→            variant="secondary"
   320→            onClick={() => {
   321→              window.open(image.src)
   322→            }}
   323→          >
   324→            查看
   325→          </StyledButton>
   326→          <StyledButton
   327→            className="rounded-l-none border-l-0 text-red-400"
   328→            variant="secondary"
   329→            onClick={() => {
   330→              handleOnChange(image.src, 'src', '')
   331→            }}
   332→          >
   333→            重置
   334→          </StyledButton>
   335→        </div>
   336→      </div>
   337→    </LabelProvider>
   338→  </div>
   339→))
   340→
   341→Item.displayName = 'AccordionItem'
   342→
   343→const ColorPicker: FC<{
   344→  accent: string
   345→  onChange: (hex: string) => void
   346→}> = ({ accent, onChange }) => {
   347→  const [currentColor, setCurrentColor] = useState(accent)
   348→  useEffect(() => {

     8→import { KateX } from '../../katex'
     9→import { blockRegex, simpleInlineRegex } from '../utils/parser'
    10→
    11→const INLINE_SKIP_R =
    12→  '((?:\\[.*?\\][([].*?[)\\]]|<.*?>(?:.*?<.*?>)?|`.*?`|\\\\\\1|[\\s\\S])+?)'
    13→
    14→//  $ c = \pm\sqrt{a^2 + b^2} $
    15→export const KateXRule: MarkdownToJSX.Rule<{
    16→  katex: string
    17→}> = {
    18→  match: simpleInlineRegex(new RegExp(`^(\\$)(${INLINE_SKIP_R})\\1`)),
    19→  order: Priority.LOW,
    20→  parse(capture) {
    21→    return {
    22→      type: 'kateX',
    23→      katex: capture[2],
    24→    }
    25→  },
    26→  render(node, output, state) {
    27→    return <KateX key={state?.key}>{node.katex}</KateX>
    28→  },
    29→}
    30→export const KateXBlockRule: MarkdownToJSX.Rule<{
    31→  groups: Record<string, string> | undefined
    32→}> = {
    33→  match: blockRegex(
    34→    new RegExp(`^\\s*\\$\\$ *(?<content>[\\s\\S]+?)\\s*\\$\\$ *(?:\n *)+\n?`),
    35→  ),
    36→
    37→  order: Priority.MED,
    38→  parse(capture) {
    39→    return {
    40→      type: 'kateXBlock',
    41→      groups: capture.groups,
    42→    }
    43→  },
    44→  render(node, _, state?) {
    45→    if (!node.groups) {
    46→      return null
    47→    }
    48→    return (
    49→      <div className="scrollbar-none overflow-auto" key={state?.key}>
    50→        <KateX mode="display">{node.groups?.content}</KateX>
    51→      </div>
    52→    )
    53→  },
    54→}
    55→

## Thorough Markdown Parsing, renderToString, and HTML Parsing Analysis

Based on my comprehensive exploration of the Shiroi codebase, here are all the findings:

### 1. **renderToString Usage**

**File:** `<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/app/feed/route.tsx` (Lines 92-96, 100-184, 195-200)

Three locations use `ReactDOM.renderToString()`:
- Line 92-96: Renders simple fallback content when RSS rendering is disabled
- Line 100-184: Main RSS feed rendering with markdown compilation via `compiler(item.text, ...)`
- Line 195-200: Error fallback rendering

Additionally, KaTeX uses `katex.renderToString()` for math rendering in `<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/ui/katex/index.tsx` (Line 21).

---

### 2. **Markdown Parser Libraries**

Primary: `markdown-to-jsx` (customized version)
- Import: `npm:@innei/markdown-to-jsx-yet@7.7.7-11`
- Location: `<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/package.json` (Line 75)

Secondary: `marked` (for dashboard image parsing)
- Usage: `<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/modules/dashboard/writing/ImageDetailSection.tsx` (Line 24)
- Function: `marked.lexer(text)` to extract image URLs from markdown AST

---

### 3. **Markdown Parsing Files**

**Main Markdown Component:**
- `<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/ui/markdown/Markdown.tsx`
  - Uses `compiler()` from markdown-to-jsx
  - Implements `slugify()` function with multiple regex replaceAll calls (lines 381-401)

**Markdown Parser Rules (Custom Extensions):**

1. **Spoiler Rule** - `<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/ui/markdown/parsers/spoiler.tsx`
   - Pattern: `||text||` format

### 7. **Critical Regex Patterns (ReDoS Analysis)**

**Shared INLINE_SKIP_R pattern** (Used in Spoiler, KaTeX, Insert):
```
((?:\\[.*?\\][([].*?[)\\]]|<.*?>(?:.*?<.*?>)?|`.*?`|\\\\\\1|\\|\\|.*?\\|\\||[\\s\\S])+?)
```
**Analysis:** Uses lazy quantifiers and alternation. Potential for catastrophic backtracking on malformed input with unmatched brackets/quotes.

**Container Rule Regex:**
```
/^\s*::: *(?<type>.*?) *(?:{(?<params>.*?)} *)?\n(?<content>[\S\s]+?)\s*::: *(?:\n *)+/
```
**Analysis:** `[\S\s]+?` with multiple optional groups - potential ReDoS on input without closing `:::`

**Container Param Parser:**
```javascript
const regex = /(\w+)=(\w+)/g
while ((match = regex.exec(input)) !== null) { ... }
```
**Analysis:** Safe, simple pattern. Potential infinite loop risk if regex doesn't advance.

**Mention Rule Regex:**
```
/^(\[(?<displayName>.*?)])?{((?<prefix>(GH)|(TW)|(TG))@(?<name>\w+\b))}\s?(?!\[.*?])/
```
**Analysis:** Nested lazy quantifier `.*?` with lookahead - moderate ReDoS risk

**Image Extraction Regex:**
```
/^!\[((?:\[[^\]]*]|[^[\]]|](?=[^[]*]))*)]\(\s*<?((?:[^\s\\]|\\.)*?)>?(?:\s+["']([\S\s]*?)["'])?\s*\)/
```
**Analysis:** Complex alternation with character classes - potential catastrophic backtracking on certain malformed markdown

**Slugify Function** (Lines 384-398):
- Uses multiple `.replaceAll()` with character class regexes
- Safe patterns (character classes), no complex backtracking risk

     1→'use client'

     3→import 'katex/dist/katex.min.css'
     4→
     5→import type { MarkdownToJSX } from 'markdown-to-jsx'
     6→import { Priority } from 'markdown-to-jsx'
     7→
     8→import { KateX } from '../../katex'
     9→import { blockRegex, simpleInlineRegex } from '../utils/parser'
    10→
    11→const INLINE_SKIP_R =
    12→  '((?:\\[.*?\\][([].*?[)\\]]|<.*?>(?:.*?<.*?>)?|`.*?`|\\\\\\1|[\\s\\S])+?)'
    13→
    14→//  $ c = \pm\sqrt{a^2 + b^2} $
    15→export const KateXRule: MarkdownToJSX.Rule<{
    16→  katex: string
    17→}> = {
    18→  match: simpleInlineRegex(new RegExp(`^(\\$)(${INLINE_SKIP_R})\\1`)),
    19→  order: Priority.LOW,
    20→  parse(capture) {
    21→    return {
    22→      type: 'kateX',
    23→      katex: capture[2],
    24→    }
    25→  },
    26→  render(node, output, state) {
    27→    return <KateX key={state?.key}>{node.katex}</KateX>
    28→  },
    29→}
    30→export const KateXBlockRule: MarkdownToJSX.Rule<{
    31→  groups: Record<string, string> | undefined
    32→}> = {
    33→  match: blockRegex(
    34→    new RegExp(`^\\s*\\$\\$ *(?<content>[\\s\\S]+?)\\s*\\$\\$ *(?:\n *)+\n?`),
    35→  ),
    36→
    37→  order: Priority.MED,
    38→  parse(capture) {
    39→    return {
    40→      type: 'kateXBlock',
    41→      groups: capture.groups,
    42→    }
    43→  },
    44→  render(node, _, state?) {
    45→    if (!node.groups) {
    46→      return null
    47→    }
    48→    return (
    49→      <div className="scrollbar-none overflow-auto" key={state?.key}>
    50→        <KateX mode="display">{node.groups?.content}</KateX>
    51→      </div>
    52→    )
    53→  },
    54→}
    55→
```

     1→import type { MarkdownToJSX } from 'markdown-to-jsx'
     2→
     3→function parseInline(
     4→  parse: MarkdownToJSX.NestedParser,
     5→  children: string,
     6→  state: MarkdownToJSX.State,
     7→): MarkdownToJSX.ParserResult[] {
     8→  const isCurrentlyInline = state.inline || false
     9→  const isCurrentlySimple = state.simple || false
    10→  state.inline = true
    11→  state.simple = true
    12→  const result = parse(children, state)
    13→  state.inline = isCurrentlyInline
    14→  state.simple = isCurrentlySimple
    15→  return result
    16→}
    17→
    18→export const parseCaptureInline: MarkdownToJSX.Parser<{
    19→  children: MarkdownToJSX.ParserResult[]
    20→}> = (capture, parse, state: MarkdownToJSX.State = {}) => {
    21→  return {
    22→    children: parseInline(parse, capture[2], state),
    23→  }
    24→}
    25→
    26→export function simpleInlineRegex(regex: RegExp) {
    27→  return allowInline(function match(
    28→    source: string,
    29→    state: MarkdownToJSX.State,
    30→  ) {
    31→    if (state.inline || state.simple) {
    32→      return regex.exec(source)
    33→    } else {
    34→      return null
    35→    }
    36→  })
    37→}
    38→
    39→export function blockRegex(regex: RegExp) {
    40→  return function match(source: string, state: MarkdownToJSX.State) {
    41→    if (state.inline || state.simple) {
    42→      return null
    43→    } else {
    44→      return regex.exec(source)
    45→    }
    46→  }
    47→}
    48→
    49→export function allowInline<T extends Function & { inline?: 0 | 1 }>(fn: T) {
    50→  fn.inline = 1
    51→
    52→  return fn
    53→}
    54→
```

     6→
     7→import { clsx } from 'clsx'
     8→import type { MarkdownToJSX } from 'markdown-to-jsx'
     9→import { compiler, RuleType, sanitizer } from 'markdown-to-jsx'
    10→import Script from 'next/script'
    11→import type * as React from 'react'
    12→import type { FC, PropsWithChildren } from 'react'
    13→import { Fragment, memo, Suspense, useCallback, useMemo } from 'react'
    14→
    15→import { setMainMarkdownElement } from '~/atoms/hooks/reading'
    16→import { ErrorBoundary } from '~/components/common/ErrorBoundary'
    17→import { CodeBlockRender } from '~/components/modules/shared/CodeBlock'
    18→import { FloatPopover } from '~/components/ui/float-popover'
    19→import { MAIN_CONTENT_ID } from '~/constants/dom-id'
    20→import { isDev } from '~/lib/env'
    21→import { noopObj } from '~/lib/noop'
    22→import { springScrollToElement } from '~/lib/scroller'
    23→
    24→import { Gallery } from '../gallery'
    25→import { MarkdownLink } from '../link/MarkdownLink'
    26→import { LinkCard, LinkCardSource } from '../link-card'
    27→import { ContainerRule } from './parsers/container'
    28→import { InsertRule } from './parsers/ins'
    29→import { KateXBlockRule, KateXRule } from './parsers/katex'
    30→import { MentionRule } from './parsers/mention'
    31→import { SpoilerRule } from './parsers/spoiler'
    32→import {
    33→  MParagraph,
    34→  MTable,
    35→  MTableBody,
    36→  MTableHead,
    37→  MTableRow,
    38→  MTableTd,
    39→  MTableTh,
    40→} from './renderers'
    41→import { MBlockQuote } from './renderers/blockqoute'
    42→import { MDetails } from './renderers/collapse'
    43→import { MFootNote } from './renderers/footnotes'
    44→import { createMarkdownHeadingComponent } from './renderers/heading'
    45→import { MarkdownImage } from './renderers/image'
    46→import { Tab, Tabs } from './renderers/tabs'
    47→import { MTag } from './renderers/tag'
    48→import { Video } from './renderers/video'
    49→import { getFootNoteDomId, getFootNoteRefDomId } from './utils/get-id'
    50→import { redHighlight } from './utils/redHighlight'
    51→
    52→export type MarkdownVariant = 'post' | 'note' | 'comment'
    53→
    54→export interface MdProps {
    55→  allowsScript?: boolean
    56→
    57→  as?: React.ElementType
    58→  className?: string
    59→  codeBlockFully?: boolean
    60→  removeWrapper?: boolean
    61→  readonly renderers?: Partial<MarkdownToJSX.PartialRules>
    62→  style?: React.CSSProperties
    63→  value?: string
    64→
    65→  variant?: MarkdownVariant
    66→
    67→  wrapperProps?: React.DetailedHTMLProps<
    68→    React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLDivElement>,
    69→    HTMLDivElement
    70→  >
    71→
    72→  wrapperRef?: React.Ref<HTMLElement>
    73→}
    74→
    75→const debugValue = isDev
    76→  ? ''
    77→  : //       '```component shadow with-styles\n' +
    78→    //         `import=https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@innei/react-cdn-components@0.0.33/dist/components/ShadowDOMTest.js
    79→    // name=MDX.ShadowDOMTest
    80→    // height=4 05` +
    81→    //         '\n' +
    82→    //         '```',
    83→    //     ].join('')
    84→    null
    85→
    86→export const Markdown: FC<MdProps & MarkdownToJSX.Options & PropsWithChildren> =
    87→  memo((props) => {
    88→    const {
    89→      value,
    90→      renderers,
    91→      style,
    92→      wrapperProps = {},
    93→      wrapperRef,
    94→      codeBlockFully = false,
    95→      className,
    96→      overrides,
    97→      extendsRules,
    98→
    99→      as: As = 'div',
   100→      allowsScript = false,
   101→      removeWrapper = false,
   102→      variant = 'post',
   103→
   104→      ...rest
   105→    } = props
   106→
   107→    const MHeader = useMemo(() => createMarkdownHeadingComponent(), [])
   108→
   109→    const node = useMemo(() => {
   110→      const mdContent = debugValue || value || props.children
   111→
   112→      if (!mdContent) return null
   113→      if (typeof mdContent !== 'string') return null
   114→
   115→      const mdElement = compiler(mdContent, {
   116→        slugify,
   117→        doNotProcessHtmlElements: ['tab', 'style', 'script'] as any[],
   118→        wrapper: null,
   119→
   120→        overrides: {
   121→          p: MParagraph,
   122→
   123→          thead: MTableHead,
   124→          tr: MTableRow,
   125→          tbody: MTableBody,
   126→          td: MTableTd,
   127→          th: MTableTh,
   128→          table: MTable,
   129→          // FIXME: footer tag in raw html will renders not as expected, but footer tag in this markdown lib will wrapper as linkReferer footnotes
   130→          footer: MFootNote,
   131→          details: MDetails,
   132→          img: MarkdownImage,
   133→          tag: MTag,
   134→
   135→          Tabs,
   136→
   137→          tab: Tab,
   138→          video: Video,
   139→
   140→          // for custom react component
   141→          // Tag: MTag,
   142→
   143→          LinkCard,
   144→          Gallery,
   145→          script: allowsScript ? Script : undefined!,
   146→
   147→          ...overrides,
   148→        },
   149→
   150→        overrideRules: {
   151→          [RuleType.heading]: {
   152→            render(node, output, state) {
   153→              return (
   154→                <MHeader id={node.id} key={state?.key} level={node.level}>
   155→                  {output(node.children, state!)}
   156→                </MHeader>
   157→              )
   158→            },
   159→          },
   160→          [RuleType.textMarked]: {
   161→            render(node, output, state) {
   162→              return (
   163→                <mark className="rounded-md" key={state?.key}>
   164→                  <span className="px-1">{output(node.children, state!)}</span>
   165→                </mark>
   166→              )
   167→            },
   168→          },
   169→          [RuleType.gfmTask]: {
   170→            render(node, _, state) {
   171→              return (
   172→                <input
   173→                  readOnly
   174→                  checked={node.completed}
   175→                  className="size-[1em]!"
   176→                  key={state?.key}
   177→                  type="checkbox"
   178→                />
   179→              )
   180→            },
   181→          },
   182→
   183→          [RuleType.link]: {
   184→            render(node, output, state) {
   185→              const { target, title } = node
   186→
   187→              let realText = ''
   188→
   189→              for (const child of node.children) {
   190→                if (child.type === RuleType.text) {
   191→                  realText += child.text
   192→                }
   193→              }
   194→
   195→              return (
   196→                <MarkdownLink
   197→                  href={sanitizer(target)!}
   198→                  key={state?.key}
   199→                  text={realText}
   200→                  title={title}
   201→                >
   202→                  {output(node.children, state!)}
   203→                </MarkdownLink>
   204→              )
   205→            },
   206→          },
   207→
   208→          [RuleType.blockQuote]: {
   209→            render(node, output, state) {
   210→              return (
   211→                <MBlockQuote alert={node.alert} key={state?.key}>
   212→                  {output(node.children, state!)}
   213→                </MBlockQuote>
   214→              )
   215→            },
   216→          },
   217→
   218→          [RuleType.footnoteReference]: {
   219→            render(node, output, state) {
   220→              const { footnoteMap, text } = node
   221→              const footnote = footnoteMap.get(text)
   222→              const linkCardId = (() => {
   223→                try {
   224→                  const thisUrl = new URL(
   225→                    footnote?.footnote?.replace(': ', '') ?? '',
   226→                  )
   227→                  const isCurrentHost =
   228→                    thisUrl.hostname === window.location.hostname
   229→                  if (!isCurrentHost && !isDev) {
   230→                    return
   231→                  }
   232→                  const { pathname } = thisUrl
   233→                  return pathname.slice(1)
   234→                } catch {
   235→                  return
   236→                }
   237→              })()
   238→
   239→              return (
   240→                <Fragment key={state?.key}>
   241→                  <FloatPopover
   242→                    as="span"
   243→                    type="tooltip"
   244→                    wrapperClassName="inline"
   245→                    triggerElement={
   246→                      <a
   247→                        href={`${getFootNoteDomId(text)}`}
   248→                        onClick={(e) => {
   249→                          e.preventDefault()
   250→                          const id = getFootNoteDomId(text)
   251→                          springScrollToElement(
   252→                            document.getElementById(id)!,
   253→                            -window.innerHeight / 2,
   254→                          )
   255→                          redHighlight(id)
   256→                        }}
   257→                      >
   258→                        <sup
   259→                          id={`${getFootNoteRefDomId(text)}`}
   260→                        >{`[^${text}]`}</sup>
   261→                      </a>
   262→                    }
   263→                  >
   264→                    {footnote?.footnote?.slice(1)}
   265→                  </FloatPopover>
   266→                  {linkCardId && (
   267→                    <LinkCard
   268→                      id={linkCardId}
   269→                      source={LinkCardSource.MixSpace}
   270→                    />
   271→                  )}
   272→                </Fragment>
   273→              )
   274→            },
   275→          },
   276→
   277→          [RuleType.codeBlock]: {
   278→            render(node, output, state) {
   279→              return (
   280→                <CodeBlockRender
   281→                  attrs={node?.rawAttrs}
   282→                  content={node.text}
   283→                  key={state?.key}
   284→                  lang={node.lang}
   285→                />
   286→              )
   287→            },
   288→          },
   289→          [RuleType.codeInline]: {
   290→            render(node, output, state) {
   291→              return (
   292→                <code
   293→                  className="rounded-md bg-neutral-200 px-2 font-mono dark:bg-neutral-800"
   294→                  key={state?.key}
   295→                >
   296→                  {node.text}
   297→                </code>
   298→              )
   299→            },
   300→          },
   301→
   302→          [RuleType.orderedList]: listRule as any,
   303→          [RuleType.unorderedList]: listRule as any,
   304→
   305→          ...renderers,
   306→        },
   307→        extendsRules: {
   308→          spoilder: SpoilerRule,
   309→          mention: MentionRule,
   310→
   311→          ins: InsertRule,
   312→          kateX: KateXRule,
   313→          kateXBlock: KateXBlockRule,
   314→          container: ContainerRule,
   315→          ...extendsRules,
   316→        },
   317→        ...rest,
   318→      })
   319→
   320→      return mdElement
   321→    }, [
   322→      value,
   323→      props.children,
   324→      allowsScript,
   325→      overrides,
   326→      extendsRules,
   327→      renderers,
   328→      rest,
   329→      MHeader,
   330→    ])
   331→
   332→    if (removeWrapper) return <Suspense>{node}</Suspense>
   333→
   334→    return (
   335→      <ErrorBoundary>
   336→        <Suspense>
   337→          <As
   338→            style={style}
   339→            {...wrapperProps}
   340→            ref={wrapperRef as any}
   341→            className={clsx(
   342→              'markdown',
   343→              codeBlockFully ? 'markdown--code-fully' : undefined,
   344→              variant !== 'post' && `markdown--${variant}`,
   345→              className,
   346→            )}
   347→          >
   348→            {node}
   349→          </As>
   350→        </Suspense>
   351→      </ErrorBoundary>
   352→    )
   353→  })
   354→Markdown.displayName = 'Markdown'
   355→
   356→export const MainMarkdown: FC<
   357→  MdProps & MarkdownToJSX.Options & PropsWithChildren
   358→> = (props) => {
   359→  const { wrapperProps = noopObj } = props
   360→  const setMainMarkdownRef = useCallback((element: HTMLElement | null) => {
   361→    setMainMarkdownElement(element)
   362→  }, [])
   363→
   364→  return (
   365→    <Markdown
   366→      as="main"
   367→      {...props}
   368→      wrapperRef={setMainMarkdownRef}
   369→      wrapperProps={useMemo(
   370→        () => ({
   371→          ...wrapperProps,
   372→          id: MAIN_CONTENT_ID,
   373→        }),
   374→        [wrapperProps],
   375→      )}
   376→    />
   377→  )
   378→}
   379→
   380→// not complete, but probably good enough
   381→function slugify(str: string) {
   382→  return (
   383→    str
   384→      .replaceAll(/[àáâãäåæ]/gi, 'a')
   385→      .replaceAll(/ç/gi, 'c')
   386→      .replaceAll(/ð/gi, 'd')
   387→      .replaceAll(/[èéêë]/gi, 'e')
   388→      .replaceAll(/[ìíîï]/gi, 'i')
   389→      .replaceAll(/ñ/gi, 'n')
   390→      .replaceAll(/[òóôõøœ]/gi, 'o')
   391→      .replaceAll(/[ùúûü]/gi, 'u')
   392→      .replaceAll(/[ýÿ]/gi, 'y')
   393→      // remove non-chinese, non-latin, non-number, non-space
   394→      .replaceAll(
   395→        /[^\d a-z\u3040-\u30FF\u4E00-\u9FFF\uAC00-\uD7AF-]/gi,
   396→        '',
   397→      )
   398→      .replaceAll(' ', '-')
   399→      .toLowerCase()
   400→  )
   401→}
   402→
   403→const listRule: Partial<
   404→  MarkdownToJSX.Rule<
   405→    MarkdownToJSX.OrderedListNode | MarkdownToJSX.UnorderedListNode
   406→  >
   407→> = {
   408→  render(node, output, state) {
   409→    const Tag = node.ordered ? 'ol' : 'ul'
   410→
   411→    return (
   412→      <Tag
   413→        key={state?.key}
   414→        start={node.type === RuleType.orderedList ? node.start : undefined}
   415→      >
   416→        {node.items.map((item: any, i: number) => {
   417→          let className = ''
   418→          if (item[0]?.type === 'gfmTask') {
   419→            className = 'list-none flex items-center'
   420→          }
   421→
   422→          return (
   423→            <li className={className} key={i}>
   424→              {output(item, state!)}
   425→            </li>
   426→          )
   427→        })}
   428→      </Tag>
   429→    )
   430→  },
   431→}
   432→
```
</details></tool-use>

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-03-10 07:26:45Z)**_

根因已明。吾析之。

## 诊断

**入口**: `/feed` route (line 100) 调用 `ReactDOM.renderToString` + `compiler(item.text)` 于 SSR。

**祸首**: `INLINE_SKIP_R` 正则，三处 parser 皆用之（`ins.tsx`, `spoiler.tsx`, `katex.tsx`）:

```
((?:\[.*?\][([].*?[)\]]|<.*?>(?:.*?<.*?>)?|`.*?`|\\\1|[\s\S])+?)
```

**ReDoS 机制**: `[\s\S]` 为万能匹配，与前四 alternative 全部重叠。若文中有 `++`（如 C++、`i++`）后接大量 markdown link `[text](url)` 或 HTML tag `<tag>` 或 inline code，而无闭合 `++`，则正则引擎须穷举所有分割组合。N 个 `[link](url)` 结构即产 2^N 路径，指数爆炸。

**触发条件**: `/feed` 编译全部文章，一篇含 `++` 加丰富 markdown 内容之文即可令服务器 CPU 卡死。

## 修复

以 `([\\s\\S]+?)` 替 `INLINE_SKIP_R`。仅一个 alternative，无重叠，O(n) 保证。代价仅失 escaped delimiter 跳过（`\++` 之类），极罕见。

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-03-10 07:27:06Z)**_

三文件已修。此 diagnostic 皆 IDE 环境问题，非吾所改引起（`moduleResolution` 配置）。

## 总结

| 项 | 详情 |
|---|---|
| **根因** | `INLINE_SKIP_R` 正则有 5 个 alternative 且 `[\s\S]` 与前 4 者重叠，致指数级回溯 |
| **触发** | `/feed` route SSR 编译文章 markdown，某篇含 `++` 后接大量 `[link](url)` 或 `<tag>` |
| **修复** | 以 `([\s\S]+?)` 替之，单一 alternative，O(n) 保证 |
| **影响** | 仅失 `\++` escaped delimiter 跳过能力，极罕用 |
| **范围** | `ins.tsx`、`spoiler.tsx`、`katex.tsx` 三处 |

**建议**：亦可查数据库，寻含 `++` 之文章，确认触发源。部署修复后 `/feed` 即安。
